question: Who holds the longest streak of consecutive games with at least one blocked shot?
notes: PLAN §12 row 14. Verified the warehouse's max streak with BLK>=1 is 5 games (Kareem 1974-02-27 to 1974-03-03). Limitation: fact_player_game_box only carries rows for games the player appeared in, so streaks span only consecutive games the player actually played (not calendar days); missed games are absent rows. Historical backfill may be sparse for blocks in early eras.
